subcodes.first_line: O 'Attar, thou who dost sacrifice thy soul! A letter redolent with musk was dispatched not long ago. Now the honored Siyyid Taqi is present [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عطار ای جان نثار چندی پیش نامه مشکباری ارسال شد حال جناب سید تقی حاضر و
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance
